title: G4GADGET 100x Wooden Spoons - Disposable Spoon Biodegradable Birch Wood Utensils for Parties, Picnics, Weddings, BBQs, and Events
features: Durable & Sturdy: Designed to handle all types of food, our spoons are strong and reliable, ideal for soups, desserts, and more.
Versatile Use: Perfect for all occasions including birthdays, weddings, picnics, BBQs, camping, and corporate events. Enjoy a sustainable dining experience every time.
Convenient & Practical: This set of 100 wooden spoons is neatly packed in eco-friendly packaging with no plastic materials, ensuring easy storage and transport.
Easy Disposal: After use, simply dispose of the spoons in your compost bin or fire pit, making cleanup both easy and environmentally responsible.
Smooth & Splinter-Free: Each spoon is carefully crafted and polished to ensure a smooth, splinter-free dining experience, providing comfort and safety with every bite.
